description: Caller is confused about whether CT angiogram needs prior auth and what intake should do.
transcript:
This is Victor Chen. I was told to schedule a CT angiogram, but another office said prior authorization is missing.
My insurance is UnitedHealthcare and I think my ID is UHC-771032.
I need to know if I can move forward or if you need more information.

gold.expected_next_step: Route to utilization review with CT angiogram authorization packet.
